vacancy_description: We are looking for a Business Analyst who can gather requirements, facilitate stakeholder workshops, document processes, prepare user stories and acceptance criteria, work with SQL/BI data, and communicate effectively with development teams.
company_description: A mid-sized enterprise software company building digital products for complex operational domains. The team values clear requirements, stakeholder alignment, and practical technical understanding.
additional_comments: Make better focus on enterprise-level delivery, stakeholder management, process modeling, SQL/data understanding, and Java backend learning.
